channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ lawyer says 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' is 'not going forward'
item.description: A DOJ attorney stated in a court filing Friday that the Trump administration's 'Anti-Weaponization Fund' has not been established and will not proceed.

item.title: Iran live updates: US strikes Iranian radar sites after drones fired toward strait
item.description: President Donald Trump announced 'major combat operations' against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: Australian DJ and musician Timmy Trumpet on embracing music in America
item.description: ABC News' Stephanie Ramos spoke with Australian musician and DJ Timmy Trumpet about his new tour and single 'All My Life,' blending instrumentals into dance music.

item.title: Former Epstein prison guard says her life was upended by conspiracy theories, threats
item.description: Tova Noel answered questions about her browsing history and bank transactions.
